entities.name: HAPEX-SAHEL
entities.description: Hydrologic Atmospheric Pilot EXperiment in the Sahel, a large-scale study of land-atmosphere interactions in the semi-arid tropics

entities.name: NIGER
entities.description: Country in West Africa where the HAPEX-Sahel experiment was conducted

entities.name: SAHEL
entities.description: Semi-arid region in Africa where the study was conducted

entities.name: LAND SURFACE ATMOSPHERE INTERACTIONS
entities.description: Interactions between the land surface and the atmosphere

entities.name: GLOBAL CIRCULATION MODEL
entities.description: A model used for simulating the Earth's climate system at a gridbox scale

entities.name: REMOTE SENSING
entities.description: Technique for gathering information from a distance

entities.name: GROUND BASED MEASUREMENTS
entities.description: Measurements taken directly on the ground

entities.name: HYDROLOGICAL MODELLING
entities.description: Mathematical simulation of water movement and distribution

entities.name: AGGREGATION TECHNIQUES
entities.description: Techniques used to combine data from different scales for large-scale estimates

entities.name: RAINY SEASON
entities.description: Period of the year characterized by increased rainfall

entities.name: DRY SEASON
entities.description: Period of the year characterized by low rainfall

entities.name: SURFACE ENERGY EXCHANGE
entities.description: Transfer of energy between the Earth's surface and the atmosphere

entities.name: BOUNDARY LAYER MEASUREMENTS
entities.description: Measurements taken within the lowest part of the atmosphere

entities.name: AIRCRAFT MEASUREMENTS
entities.description: Measurements taken using aircraft to provide information at scales of 100-500 km2
